pre_execution_confirmation.title: 🚨 LIVE EXECUTION WARNING 🚨
pre_execution_confirmation.body:
You are about to execute a REAL transaction on Solana mainnet:
• {action}: {amount_in} {token_in} → {amount_out} {token_out}
• Slippage tolerance: {slippage}%
• Network fee: ~{fee} SOL

⚠️ Risk Warning: Cryptocurrency trading involves risk of loss.

post_execution_report.title: ✅ Transaction Executed

risk_circuit_breaker.title: ⛔ Transaction Blocked by Risk Control

onboarding.disclosure:
📢 RISK DISCLOSURE

Trading digital assets involves significant risk. Prices can be extremely volatile. Only trade with money you can afford to lose.

pre_execution_confirmation.title: 🚨 实盘执行警告 🚨
pre_execution_confirmation.body:
你即将在 Solana 主网执行一笔真实交易：
• {action}: {amount_in} {token_in} → {amount_out} {token_out}
• 滑点容差: {slippage}%
• 网络费用: ~{fee} SOL

⚠️ 风险提示：加密货币交易存在亏损风险。

post_execution_report.title: ✅ 交易已执行

risk_circuit_breaker.title: ⛔ 交易被风险控制拦截

onboarding.disclosure:
📢 风险披露

数字资产交易涉及重大风险。价格波动剧烈。请仅使用您能承受损失的资金进行交易。
